Aggregated execute batches: completed 13/13.
Batch 1: Batch 1 verification is complete. The Phase 1 source changes for T1-T4 were already present in the workspace exactly as approved, so no additional source edits were required. Scoped verification passed: ESLint was clean for the touched files, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/lora src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/__tests__/ImageEditContext.test.tsx` passed with 20/20 files and 114/114 tests. I also reran the full `npm test` suite in `reigh-app`; it completed with 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, all outside the Phase 1 files touched by this batch.
Batch 2: Phase 1 validation is complete on the automated side and paused where the plan requires. The scoped Phase 1 vitest run passed, a throwaway jsdom repro confirmed the LoRA close-path no longer blocks textarea typing or model-select opening, the repro test file was deleted immediately after it passed, and I did not begin Phase 2 because manual user confirmation is still pending.
Batch 3: Verified T6 against the current repository state. `reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/EditModePanel.tsx` is a 126-line router that dispatches to six sibling panels under `components/editModes/`, and no JSX IIFE blocks remain. Scoped verification passed with eslint clean and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` finishing at 42/42 files and 183/183 tests. The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests.
Batch 4: Verified T7 in the current repository state and checkpointed the batch note. The override surface is fully enumerated and the decision remains Path B: requiring explicit edit-panel state props is materially smaller than fabricating a full lightbox provider tree for inline edit. Full `npm test` was re-run and still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests.
Batch 5: Verified the existing Path B implementation for T8 in the current worktree, re-ran the required validation, and checkpointed batch 5 metadata. The edit panel now resolves state from explicit props only along this path, InlineEditView still flushes and closes correctly, and the inline variant controls still operate through a single render path.
Batch 6: T9 is complete. The current workspace already satisfies the `useInpainting` cleanup: caller-owned annotation/prompt/generation-count state is required, the fallback-setter pattern is gone, and the reset-on-undefined effect is absent. I re-verified the implementation and checkpointed batch 6 metadata.
Batch 7: Validated T10. Phase 2 type-check passed, the scoped media-lightbox/edit-images vitest run passed, and the batch checkpoint was updated with the current verification results. Full `npm test` still fails outside this batch with the same broader repo failure buckets; none of those failures are in the Phase 2 scopes validated here.
Batch 8: T11 is complete in the current workspace without additional source edits. I re-audited the implementation and confirmed the three free-text fields in this flow are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`; they now update local state plus `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on keystroke, flush on blur, flush before every generate action, and flush on lightbox/inline close, while sliders and toggles remain on the debounced autosave path. `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side guards in `autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts` remain in place with explanatory comments, and `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, plus the old per-save newer-edit comparator are absent.

Validation rerun in `reigh-app` succeeded for `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` with 46/46 files and 223/223 tests passing. The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4506 passed tests.
Batch 9: Completed T12 in `reigh-app`: `useAutoSaveSettings` now routes entity transitions through reducer actions instead of the old render-time preview path, with `useLayoutEffect` dispatching `ENTITY_CHANGED`, loaders continuing to use `LOAD_STARTED` and `LOAD_RESOLVED`, and local edits staying on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. I updated the helper/test coverage around the new entity-transition resolver, adjusted the persistence comment that referred to the old behavior, and wrote the batch checkpoint to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/clean-up-medialightbox-edit-20260414-1623/execution_batch_9.json`.

Verification passed for `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest (`src/shared/settings/hooks` + `src/shared/hooks/settings`, 4/4 files and 42/42 tests). The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4508 passed tests.
Batch 10: T13 completed. Scoped persistence validation passed: the `useAutoSaveSettings` / edit-settings persistence suites ran green at 7/7 files and 58/58 tests, and a temporary integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` path verified zero character loss across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL during an in-flight async load, mode switches, close-time flush, and an entity switch with pending text. The throwaway stress-test file was deleted after the run. The required full `npm test` rerun still fails elsewhere in the repo at 27 failed files / 44 failed tests, so Phase 3 validation is complete but the repo-wide suite is not green.
Batch 11: T14 completed. I found existing ESLint flat-config infrastructure in `reigh-app/eslint.config.js`, so I added the Dialog guard there instead of a grep fallback. The new `no-restricted-syntax` rule flags `if (!open)` / `if (!isOpen)` null returns only when they sit immediately before a `return <Dialog ...>`. I added one violating fixture, one compliant fixture, and a small verification script. Validation passed: the dedicated fixture-check script confirmed the invalid fixture fails and the valid fixture passes; direct ESLint on the fixtures reported exactly one error on the violating fixture; and targeted ESLint on the real dialog files stayed clean.
Batch 12: T15 completed. `reigh-app/CLAUDE.md` is a symlink to `.cursorrules`, so I appended the new guidance there. The doc now states that required-provider hooks must throw when context is missing, that `Safe` variants are opt-in only for genuinely optional consumers with inline justification, and it cites the motivating incident where `EMPTY_FORM` no-op setters caused the media-lightbox edit textarea to silently drop typing. Verification confirmed the new section is present and no new `.md` files were created. I also checkpointed the batch result in `execution_batch_12.json`.
Batch 13: Final verification was executed, but T16 could not be completed cleanly. The dialog early-return guard check passed, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, and a throwaway repro test covering the original LoRA-close -> textarea typing -> model select flow passed and was deleted afterward. Repo-wide verification is still red: `npm run lint` reports 247 errors, and the full reigh-app vitest suite finishes with 19 failed files / 36 failed tests.
